provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Atmospheric Pollution (Prevention) Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Appointment of officers
provisions.content:
3. Appointment of officers
(1) The Minister shall, for the purposes of this Act, appoint—

definitions.definition: the person appointed as Air Pollution Control Officer in terms of section 3
the Atmospheric Pollution Appeals Board established by section 12
any area which has under section 7 been declared to be a controlled area
any solid matter in a fine or disintegrated form which is capable of being dispersed or suspended in the atmosphere

any process prescribed by the Minister which is involved in any trade, occupation or manufacture devoted to production by physical, mechanical, electrical, chemical or thermal means, including any process involved in metallurgical operations, operations for the generation of power, and ancillary operations
a person appointed as inspector in terms of section 3
any of the following groups of compounds when in the form of gas, namely, hydrocarbons

smoke, gases including noxious or offensive gases, vapours, fumes, grit, dust or other matter capable of being dispersed or suspended in the atmosphere which is produced or is likely to be produced by any industrial process
any owner, lessee or occupier of property on which an industrial process is being carried on or any other person responsible for carrying on any industrial process on any property

any building or other structure together with the land on which it is situated and any adjoining land occupied or used in connection with any activities carried on in such building or structure, and includes any land without any buildings or other structures
a regulation made under the provisions of section 15
soot, ash, grit and gritty particles emitted in smoke.
